productDisplayName: Allen Solly Kids Girls Poplin Yellow Capris
description: Style NoteColour happy pastel tones in this oh-so-cute pair of capris to match the colours of spring, from allen solly, now on myntra. This pretty piece is sure to become any girl's favourite! Has a zipper at the side for a perfect Fit (with room to grow). Now, what's not to love?Product DetailsPale yellow capris with a crystal stud at the waist button, has a zipper at the front, two pockets, embroidery below the pockets, two pockets at the back and elasticated hemsMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDelicate cycleDo not bleach or iron on printWarm iron when neededTumble dry low or lay flat to dry
